mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, QUIZ_IDX, QUIZ_QUESTION_IDX, QUIZ_QUESTION_TITLE, QUIZ_QUESTION_TYPE, QUIZ_QUESTION_ITEM, QUIZ_QUESTION_ANSWER FROM QUIZ_QUESTION WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} ORDER BY QUIZ_QUESTION_IDX
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ_QUESTION WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} ORDER BY QUIZ_QUESTION_IDX

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, QUIZ_IDX, QUIZ_QUESTION_IDX, QUIZ_QUESTION_TITLE, QUIZ_QUESTION_TYPE, QUIZ_QUESTION_ITEM, QUIZ_QUESTION_ANSWER FROM QUIZ_QUESTION WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} AND QUIZ_QUESTION_IDX = #{quiz_question_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE QUIZ_QUESTION SET QUIZ_QUESTION_TITLE = #{quiz_question_title}, QUIZ_QUESTION_TYPE = #{quiz_question_type}, QUIZ_QUESTION_ITEM = #{quiz_question_item}, QUIZ_QUESTION_ANSWER = #{quiz_question_answer} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} AND QUIZ_QUESTION_IDX = #{quiz_question_idx}
